scenes.text:
When you focus on impact,
income becomes a byproduct.

The people who make the most money are the ones who help the most people. It is not complicated. Solve a problem for one person,
earn a little. Solve it for a million people, become a millionaire. Impact is the engine. Income is the exhaust. Stop chasing the exhaust.

Ask yourself every day. How many lives did I touch today? How many problems did I solve?
How much value did I create? When those numbers go up, your bank account follows automatically.

Serve a million people.
The money handles itself.

Whose life did you impact today?
Share below. Follow for impact-first living.
